sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71905" key="o)beliafo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀβελ-ιᾱφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀβελίαι,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.75</biblScope> </bibl> : in pl., title of play by Ephippus.</sense> </entryFree>
